extension.description: Unified Developer Messenger for VS Code
view.chats.name: Chats
cmd.shareLocation: Yapper: Send Line Link to Chat
cmd.shareDiff: Yapper: Send Git Diff to Chat
cmd.shareCommit: Yapper: Send Latest Commit to Chat
config.title: Yapper
config.notifications.enabled: Show a notification for new incoming messages
config.notifications.showPreview: Show message text in the notification (otherwise only the sender)
welcome.content:
Sign in to see your chats.
[Sign in](command:yapper.login)
[Switch messenger](command:yapper.switchMessenger)
